title: Insurance Agent Portfolio Website

requirements.text: Implement hero section with H1 headline 'Protect What Matters Most. Build Wealth That Lasts.', subheadline 'Helping professionals and families secure their financial future with intelligent insurance and long-term protection strategies.', emotional trigger line 'One unexpected moment should never destroy a lifetime of hard work.', two CTA buttons ('Book Free Consultation' primary, 'Get Custom Protection Plan' secondary), professional photo placeholder, and subtle animated gold or blue gradient lines on dark luxury background

quotes: H1 Headline (SEO optimized): "Protect What Matters Most. Build Wealth That Lasts."
One unexpected moment should never destroy a lifetime of hard work.

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays H1, subheadline, and emotional trigger line exactly as specified
Two distinct CTA buttons with specified text are visible and clickable
Professional photo placeholder is present
Animated gradient lines are visible with gold or blue colors
Dark luxury background is applied

requirements.text: Create trust/authority bar displaying 'Licensed & Certified Insurance Advisor', '500+ Families Protected', '98% Claim Support Success', '5-Star Client Satisfaction', and industry certification badges

quotes:
• Licensed & Certified Insurance Advisor
• 500+ Families Protected
• 98% Claim Support Success
• 5-Star Client Satisfaction
• Industry certifications badges

acceptanceCriteria: Authority bar displays all five trust elements
Stats are prominently visible
Certification badge placeholders are present

requirements.text: Build About section with headline 'Why I Chose to Protect Lives — Not Just Sell Policies', emotional storytelling covering realization about financial vulnerability, mission-driven mindset, focus on family protection, transparency and long-term relationships, and key message 'I don't sell policies. I design financial safety systems.'

quotes: Headline: "Why I Chose to Protect Lives — Not Just Sell Policies"
"I don't sell policies. I design financial safety systems."

acceptanceCriteria: About section includes specified headline
Emotional storytelling content covers all four themes
Key message is prominently displayed

requirements.text: Create Services section with five premium animated service cards (Life Insurance, Health Insurance, Term Plans, Investment Plans, Retirement Planning), each with short benefit-driven description, emotional value statement, mini-CTA button, icon, hover effects, and clean layout

quotes:
Life Insurance
Health Insurance
Term Plans
Investment Plans
Retirement Planning

Each must include:
• Short benefit-driven description
• Emotional value
• Clear mini-CTA button
• Icons
• Clean layout

acceptanceCriteria: Five service cards are displayed
Each card has title, description, emotional value, icon, and CTA button
Hover effects are applied to cards
Layout is clean and organized

requirements.text: Build Why Choose Me section with headline 'Not Just an Agent. Your Long-Term Financial Partner.' and seven bullet points: Personalized protection strategy, Fast claim support, 100% transparency, No hidden surprises, Annual financial review, 24/7 availability, Long-term advisory relationship

quotes: Headline: "Not Just an Agent. Your Long-Term Financial Partner."

• Personalized protection strategy
• Fast claim support
• 100% transparency
• No hidden surprises
• Annual financial review
• 24/7 availability
• Long-term advisory relationship

acceptanceCriteria: Section displays specified headline
All seven bullet points are listed
Content is visually organized

requirements.text: Create Testimonials section with 3-5 emotional client testimonials, each featuring 5-star ratings, real-life impact storytelling, before/after emotional contrast, and clean card layout

quotes:
Include 3–5 emotional testimonials with:

• 5-star ratings
• Real-life impact storytelling
• Before/after emotional contrast
• Clean card layout

acceptanceCriteria: 3-5 testimonial cards are displayed
Each testimonial shows 5-star rating
Testimonials include emotional storytelling with before/after contrast
Cards have clean, consistent layout

requirements.text: Implement Emotional Close section with headline 'Your Family Deserves Security. Don't Wait.', scarcity line 'Every day without protection increases financial risk.', CTA 'Book Your Free Financial Protection Session Now', subtext 'Limited consultation slots available weekly.', and strong visual contrast with spotlight effect

quotes: Headline: "Your Family Deserves Security. Don't Wait."
Scarcity line: Every day without protection increases financial risk.
CTA: "Book Your Free Financial Protection Session Now"

acceptanceCriteria: Section displays all specified copy elements
CTA button is prominently visible
Visual contrast and spotlight effect are applied
Scarcity messaging is clear

requirements.text: Build Contact section with premium contact form (Name, Phone, Email, Message fields), WhatsApp quick connect button, sticky floating CTA button, and calendar booking integration placeholder

quotes:
Simple premium contact form:

• Name
• Phone
• Email
• Message

• WhatsApp quick connect button
• Sticky floating CTA
• Calendar booking integration

acceptanceCriteria: Contact form displays all four fields
WhatsApp button is visible and functional
Sticky floating CTA appears on scroll
Form submission captures lead data
Calendar booking placeholder is present

requirements.text: Implement dark luxury theme with deep navy or black background, gold accent color (#D4AF37), electric blue accent (#2563EB), and bright gold or vibrant yellow for CTAs

quotes: Theme: Dark luxury theme (deep navy or black background)
Accent colors: Gold (#D4AF37) and electric blue (#2563EB)
CTA color: Bright high-contrast (gold or vibrant yellow)

acceptanceCriteria: Background uses deep navy or black
Gold (#D4AF37) is applied as accent color
Electric blue (#2563EB) is applied as secondary accent
CTA buttons use bright gold or vibrant yellow

requirements.text: Apply typography system using Montserrat font for headings and Poppins font for body text

quotes: Typography: Modern sans-serif like Montserrat (headings) and Poppins (body)

acceptanceCriteria: All headings use Montserrat font
All body text uses Poppins font
Fonts load correctly

requirements.text: Implement glassmorphism card styling with smooth animations including parallax effects, micro-interactions on buttons, and soft glowing hover effects

quotes:
• Glassmorphism cards
• Smooth animations
• Subtle parallax effects
• Micro-interactions on buttons
• Soft glowing hover effects

acceptanceCriteria: Cards use glassmorphism styling (transparency, blur)
Parallax effects are visible on scroll
Buttons have micro-interactions
Hover effects include soft glowing appearance
Animations are smooth and performant

requirements.text: Implement sticky header with smooth scroll navigation

quotes: • Sticky header
• Smooth scroll navigation

acceptanceCriteria: Header remains visible on scroll
Navigation links trigger smooth scroll to sections

requirements.text: Add floating WhatsApp icon that remains visible while scrolling

quotes: • Floating WhatsApp icon

acceptanceCriteria: WhatsApp icon floats on the page
Icon remains visible during scroll
Icon links to WhatsApp contact

requirements.text: Ensure mobile-first responsive design that works seamlessly on all device sizes

quotes: • Mobile-first responsive

acceptanceCriteria: Layout adapts to mobile, tablet, and desktop screens
All interactive elements are touch-friendly on mobile
Content remains readable on small screens

requirements.text: Apply SEO optimization including semantic HTML5 structure with proper H1/H2/H3 hierarchy

quotes: • SEO-optimized headings (H1, H2, H3 hierarchy)
• Clean HTML5 semantic structure

acceptanceCriteria: HTML uses semantic tags (header, main, section, article, footer)
Single H1 per page
H2 and H3 tags follow logical hierarchy
Content structure supports SEO best practices

requirements.text: Implement backend form submission handler to capture leads with Name, Phone, Email, and Message fields

quotes:
Simple premium contact form:

• Name
• Phone
• Email
• Message
• Lead capture form connected to email

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores lead submissions with all four fields
Form data is validated
Submissions are persisted

requirements.text: Render generated hero background image, professional agent portrait placeholder, and service icons as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated directory
Hero section uses generated background image
Professional portrait is displayed in hero
Service icons are rendered in service cards

constraints: Do not integrate third-party services like Twilio, SendGrid, or external calendar APIs
Do not implement real-time chat or WebSocket features
Do not integrate external payment processors beyond what's supported natively
All animations must be CSS-based for performance
nonGoals: External analytics tracking setup beyond basic structure

required: Dark luxury hero background with subtle gold and electric blue gradient accents, deep navy or black base (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Professional insurance agent portrait placeholder in business attire, confident expression, corporate headshot style (agent-portrait.dim_400x400.png)
Life insurance icon, gold line art style on transparent background (icon-life.dim_64x64.png)
Health insurance icon, gold line art style on transparent background (icon-health.dim_64x64.png)
Term plan icon, gold line art style on transparent background (icon-term.dim_64x64.png)
Investment plan icon, gold line art style on transparent background (icon-investment.dim_64x64.png)
Retirement planning icon, gold line art style on transparent background (icon-retirement.dim_64x64.png)
